🎯 Discovery Call Intake Form

Company {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').item.json.clientCompany }}

Submitted {{ $now.format("DD") }}

What are your top 3 leadership challenges right now?

{{ $('Extract Intake Data').item.json.challenges }}

What does success look like 6 months from now?

{{ $('Extract Intake Data').item.json.successVision }}

📚 Past Experience

What's worked or not worked with past coaching or development?

{{ $('Extract Intake Data').item.json.pastExperience || 'Not specified' }}

🎓 Focus Areas

Specific topics to focus on:

{{ (() => { const areas = $('Extract Intake Data').item.json.focusAreas; if (Array.isArray(areas)) { return areas.map(area => `${area}`).join(''); } return 'Not specified'; })() }}

parameters.commentText: =✅ Intake form completed!  **Top 3 Challenges:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.challenges }}  **Success Vision:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.successVision }}  **Focus Areas:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.focusAreas.join(', ') }}  **Coaching Style Preference:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.coachingStyle }}  📄 **Full Intake PDF:** {{ $('Get PDF Details').first().json.pdfUrl }}

updateFields.content: =**📋 INTAKE HIGHLIGHTS**  **Client:** {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.clientName }} **Company:** {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.clientCompany }} **Email:** {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.clientEmail }}  ---  **🎯 Top Challenges:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.challenges }}  **💡 Success Vision (6 months):** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.successVision }}  **📚 Focus Areas:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.focusAreas.join(', ') }}  **⚙️ Preferred Coaching Style:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.coachingStyle }}  **❓ Questions/Concerns:** {{ $('Extract Intake Data').first().json.concerns || 'None' }}  ---  **📄 Resources:** - [View Intake PDF]({{ $('Get PDF Details').first().json.pdfUrl }}) - [Client Drive Folder]({{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.driveFolderUrl }})  ---  **📞 Call Details:** 🗓️ {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.scheduledDate }} at {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.scheduledTime }} EST 🔗 {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').first().json.zoomLink }}

parameters.subject: Thanks for completing the intake form!
parameters.message:
=

✅ Intake Form Received!

Hi {{ $json.clientName }},

Perfect! I've received your intake form and I'm really looking forward to our conversation.

📅 Our Call Details:

Date: {{ $json.callDate || 'To be scheduled' }}

Time: {{ $json.callTime || 'To be scheduled' }} EST

Zoom Link: Click here to join

I'll use the next few days to review your responses and prepare some specific questions about {{ $json.focusArea1 }}{{ $json.focusArea2 ? ' and ' + $json.focusArea2 + '' : '' }}.

💡 Quick Tip: Between now and our call, jot down any additional thoughts or examples related to the challenges you mentioned. This will help us dive deeper during our conversation.

If you think of any additional questions or topics you'd like to discuss before our call, feel free to reply to this email anytime.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
NiffyJade
Founder, Momentum Coaching
adefisayooluwanifemi28.com

This email was sent because you completed an intake form for your upcoming discovery call.

Need to reschedule? Just reply to this email.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Intake completed but ClickUp tasks not found - {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').item.json.clientName }}

Please create tasks manually or check the Schedule Confirmation Handler workflow.  Client Details: - Name: {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').item.json.clientName }} - Email: {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').item.json.clientEmail }} - Company: {{ $('Get Client Drive Details').item.json.clientCompany }}  Intake PDF: {{ $('Get PDF Details').item.json.pdfUrl }}
